sections.paragraph:
εὐσταθέω impv. εὐστάθει; impf. 3 pl. εὐσταθοῦσαν (Mlt-H. 194f); fut. inf. εὐσταθήσειν 3 Macc 7:4; aor. 3 sg. εὐστάθησεν 2 Macc 14:25; impv. 2 sg. εὐστάθησον (Mel., P. 24, 174) to be free from inner or outward disturbance, be stable, be tranquil, be at rest (Ps.-Eur., Rhesus 317; Dionys. Hal., Plut., Lucian, Epict.; Vett. Val. 42, 21; Herm. Wr. 466, 22 Sc.; OGI 54, 19; SIG 708, 35; IMaronIsis 30; BGU 1764, 14 [I b.c.]; 2 Macc 14:25; TestJob 36:5; Jos., Ant. 15, 137 περὶ τ. βίον; Mel., P. 24, 174) lead a quiet life Hm 5, 2, 2; be at rest (in contrast to affliction) Hs 7:3; be calm (Epict. 1, 29, 61), or stand firm εὐστάθει IPol 4:1. Of sheep οὐκ εὐσταθοῦσαν they had no peace Hs 6, 2, 7.—DELG s.v. στάθμη.

impv. impv. = imperative

impf. impf. = imperfect

  1. pl. = plural

Mlt-H. Mlt-H. = JMoulton/WHoward, A Grammar of NT Greek II: Accidence and Word-formation—List 6

fut. fut. = fut.

inf. inf. = infinitive

aor. aor. = aorist

  1. sg. = singular

Mel. Mel. = Melito of Sardis, II a.d.—List 5

Ps. Ps. = pseudo, pseudonymous

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

Epict Epict , various works, I–II a.d.—List 5

Herm. Wr. Herm. Wr. = Hermetic Writings—List 5

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

IMaronIsis IMaronIsis = Une nouvelle arétalogie d’Isis à Maronée—List 3

BGU BGU = Aegyptische Urkunden aus den Museen zu Berlin: Griechische Urkunden—List 4

TestJob TestJob = Testament of Job—List 2

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Hm Hm = Mandates

Hs Hs = Similitudes

IPol IPol = Ignatius to Polycarp—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 413
